<!-- Auto-generated by catchmytask. Do not edit. -->
# Project Conventions

## IDs
- Default prefix: CMT (4-digit padding, e.g., CMT-0001)

## States (default machine)
- inbox (initial)
- ready
- active
- blocked
- cancelled (terminal)
- done (terminal)

Transitions:
  inbox -> ready
  inbox -> cancelled
  ready -> active
  ready -> cancelled
  active -> blocked
  active -> done
  active -> cancelled
  blocked -> active
  blocked -> cancelled

## Defaults
- type: task
- priority: none
- status: inbox

## Tags
Namespaces: team, domain, sprint, priority

## Git
- auto_commit: false
- commit_prefix: cmt
